sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 8:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 8:1
items.html: The first Rosh that came out of the Tabur of the inner AK and up to the Chazeh, called YESHSUT, is the first phase of Nekudim. However, it is considered Akudim since the coarseness in the screen that stands at the place of the Tabur is completely inactive from below upward; hence, this Rosh has nothing of the phase of Nekudim. (Inner Light, Item 20)
